allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['msg'], '→', r['ok']\) for r in d['resultados'] if 'utf8mb4' in r['msg']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['msg'], '✓' if r['ok'] else '✗'\) for r in d['resultados'] if 'error' in r['msg'].lower\(\) or not r['ok']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); next\(\(print\(r['msg']\) for r in d['resultados'] if 'errores' in r['msg']\), None\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['id'], '-', c['titulo'][:60]\) for c in d['cursos']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total cursos:', len\(d['cursos']\)\); [print\(f\\"  id={c['id']} act={c['activo']} temas={c.get\('num_temas'\)} t={c['titulo'][:50]}\\"\) for c in d['cursos']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['materiales'][0]; print\('Material primero:'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in m.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['temas']; print\('Primer tema:'\); print\('  duracion:', t[0].get\('duracion'\)\); print\('  duracion_seg:', t[0].get\('duracion_seg'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('cursos',d.get\('data',[]\)\); [print\(f\\"id={x.get\('id'\)} | {x.get\('titulo'\)!r} | precio={x.get\('precio'\)} | price_id={x.get\('stripe_price_id'\)} | pack={x.get\('pack'\)}\\"\) for x in c]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('packs',d.get\('data',[]\)\); [print\(f\\"id={x.get\('id'\)} | {x.get\('nombre'\)!r} | precio={x.get\('precio'\)} | price_id={x.get\('stripe_price_id'\)} | activo={x.get\('activo'\)}\\"\) for x in p]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('cursos',d\) if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d; [print\(\('LIVE ' if 'ClFjdCxTSQ' in \(x.get\('stripe_price_id'\) or ''\) else 'TEST '\)+f\\"id={x.get\('id'\)} {x.get\('stripe_price_id'\)}\\"\) for x in c]")
